CustomField.description:
Represents the amount of time an instructional call has been required.
Note: 1 is subtracted in the logic because the Instructional Call Action is not required until 1 day after the Last Instructional Call Attempt
CustomField.formula: IF(AND(Instructional_Call_Required__c, ISBLANK(Last_Instructional_Call_Attempt__c)), NOW() - Date_Received_by_Patient__c, IF(AND(Instructional_Call_Required__c, NOT(ISBLANK(Last_Instructional_Call_Attempt__c))), NOW() - Last_Instructional_Call_Attempt__c - 1, NULL))*24
CustomField.label: Instructional Call Required Time (Hours)
